mapper.select:
select * from t_order
and order_no like concat('%', #{order_no}, '%')
order by order_time desc
limit #{start},#{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_order
and order_no like concat('%', #{order_no}, '%')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS TIME ,SUM(sett_amount) AS sales_volume FROM t_order WHERE transac_status='success' AND order_receiving='rec_order' GROUP BY TIME ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 0,7

SELECT DAYOFWEEK(order_time) as day_of_week, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM t_order WHERE order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND transac_status = 'success' AND order_receiving = 'rec_order' GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(order_time) ORDER BY day_of_week

SELECT MONTH(order_time) as month, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM t_order WHERE YEAR(order_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND transac_status = 'success' AND order_receiving = 'rec_order' GROUP BY MONTH(order_time) ORDER BY month
SELECT YEAR(order_time) as year, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM t_order WHERE transac_status = 'success' AND order_receiving = 'rec_order' GROUP BY YEAR(order_time) ORDER BY year

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as order_date, IFNULL(SUM(sett_amount), 0) as total_sales FROM t_order WHERE order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND transac_status = 'success' AND order_receiving = 'rec_order' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY order_date ASC

SELECT MONTH(order_time) as month, IFNULL(SUM(sett_amount), 0) as total_sales FROM t_order WHERE YEAR(order_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND transac_status = 'success' AND order_receiving = 'rec_order' GROUP BY YEAR(order_time), MONTH(order_time) ORDER BY YEAR(order_time), MONTH(order_time) ASC

SELECT YEAR(order_time) as year, IFNULL(SUM(sett_amount), 0) as total_sales FROM t_order WHERE transac_status = 'success' AND order_receiving = 'rec_order' GROUP BY YEAR(order_time) ORDER BY YEAR(order_time) ASC
